pageContext.name: X-Men #1: Rogue
pageContext.description: Let's go to work then. We have a world to save.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the X-Men #1: Rogue Fine Art Print, a mesmerizing Marvel Comics art print by fan-favorite cover artist J. Scott Campbell with colors by Sabine Rich.  While Gambit may be the true thief on the team, Rogue of the X-Men is known for her ability to take powers, memories, and life force with a simple touch. Despite villainous origins, she's just as sweet as a Southern peach — but that doesn't mean she isn't full of spice as well. J. Scott Campbell gives his signature take on this beloved super heroine with a unique utilization of vibrant green negative space to highlight her suited silhouette. With her classic costume and big hair, Anna Marie will steal your attention too if you're not careful!  Originally created as a variant cover for X-Men #1 (2021), written by Gerry Duggan for Marvel Comics, this comic book collectible is now available for fans in a fine art format. Each X-Men #1: Rogue Fine Art Print is hand-signed by J. Scott Campbell and features an embossed Seal of Authenticity as part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. This super hero artwork will make a stunning addition to any Marvel fan or Campbell collector's wall, and is available both unframed or in a custom framed presentation.  It's alright, sugah — the gloves are on. Get absorbed by the artistry of the X-Men #1: Rogue Fine Art Print by J. Scott Campbell today!
